marketData.title: Popularity
marketData.info: An indication of the current popularity of a particular cryptocurrency.

marketData.title: Market Cap
marketData.info:
Market cap is calculated by multiplying the asset's circulating supply with its current price.
What this means:
A high market cap implies that the asset is highly valued by the market. Currently, the highest market cap asset is Bitcoin.

marketData.title: Circulation Supply
marketData.info:
Market cap is calculated by multiplying the asset's circulating supply with its current price.
What this means:
A high market cap implies that the asset is highly valued by the market. Currently, the highest market cap asset is Bitcoin.

infoHtml:
Tether USDt is experiencing a rise in value this week.
Currently, Tether USDt is priced at ₺34.04 per USDT, with a circulating supply of 117.86B USDT, resulting in a total market capitalisation of ₺4,011.67B.
Over the past 24 hours, the trading volume for Tether USDt has increased by ₺-21,779,620,505,408.40, representing a -15.8378% rise. Moreover, USDT worth ₺1,375.17B has been traded in the last day.
conversionInfoHtml:
Tether USDt's exchange rate is experiencing an increase.
Currently, the value of 1 USDT is 34.04 TRY, indicating that purchasing 5 USDT would cost 170.19 TRY. Conversely, 1.00 TRY can be exchanged for 0.0293793 USDT, and 50.00 TRY can be exchanged for 1.4689654 USDT, exclusive of platform or gas fees.
